results.rendered_html:
uddyota (von dyut mit ud)
1〉 adj. aufleuchtend, strahlend: harṣaraśmibhiruddyotaṃ tasyāntaḥpuramābabhau  R. 1,15,19 .
— 2〉 m. ausstrahlendes Licht, Glanz  H. 101 . ambudairvidyududdyotaprasrutaiḥ  SUŚR. 1,22,17 . tribhirnetraiḥ kṛtoddyotaṃ tribhiḥ sūryairiboditaiḥ  MBH. 13,846 . tasya (ratnasya) kāntyā mahānuddyoto jātaḥ  VET. 2,11 . bildl.: kuloddyotakarī tava  R. 1,35,21 . Leuchte, Enthüllung  Verz. d. B. H. No. 648 . uddyotamayūkha No. 1403 .

results.rendered_html:
uddyota a. Shining, blazing.
— taḥ
1 Light, lustre (lit. and fig.);
(pb) tribhirnetraiḥ kṛtoddyotaṃ  Mb. ; kuloddyotakarī tava  Rām.  adorning or gracing.
2 Revelation.
3 A division of a book, chapter, section.
